actors: all actors to be shown in dialog from left to right
template_scene_name.text:
This is the text that will be displayed.
[character] Will say this line.
[character:angry]Will have this emotion.
If there's no 
 at the end of a sentence there will be no pause.
template_scene_name.prompt: This is the text that will be shown when the options are done.

debug.text:
Things are loading, which should make me happy...
[cat]But I am still mad... [cat:very_angry]Very mad.
debug.prompt: This is the text that will be shown when the options are done.

minigame_outcome.draw: we can't actually hit both minigame and prompts

todo.text:
[death:bashful]Oh.
Oh boy.
[death]This is embarassing.
You've reached a TODO item in the script that was never removed and never compeleted.
Sorry about that.  What would you like me to do?
todo.prompt: 'What would you like me to do?'

quick_end.text:
Well that was fast.
Game Over.
You've found the SPEEDRUN end!  How many others are there?  At least one.  Click to return to the main menu.

slow_reluctant_end.text:
After much delay you finally agree to follow death.
Your journey is entirely without small talk.
It's hard to tell if it's because death is annoyed or not.
Game Over.
You've found the SLOW end.  Click to return to menu.
